mechanism: CMBS rated-final maturities create hard-stop timelines that prevent extend-and-pretend for the securitized portion (~$650B), forcing loss recognition within 24-36 months regardless of bank forbearance on bilateral loans
regime_dependence: CMBS structural constraints are near-mechanical and hold regardless of macro regime. The modification is to the blended outcome: Japan-style for bank loans but time-bound for CMBS
